title: Use a machine-readable AI operating system for long-lived repository work
context: The repository is expected to be maintained and extended primarily by AI. Human input is reserved for decisions, credentials, external actions, and risk acceptance.
decision: Store AI operating rules, taskbook, evidence policy, system map, review checklists, and decision records as machine-readable JSON with executable validation scripts.
consequences: AI cold starts should begin with pnpm ai:context and pnpm ai:doctor.
Human document review is not an acceptance gate.
Automation can fail early when machine-readable governance drifts.
